name: Beef Tenderloin Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup balsamic vinegar, or red wine vinegar
1 head bibb lettuce, torn into bite-size pieces
1 head red leaf lettuce, torn into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a heavy large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Season steaks with pepper.
3. Add steaks to the skillet and cook to desired doneness (about 5 minutes per side for medium-rare).
4. Transfer steaks to a platter. Let stand until cool, about 15 minutes.
5. Cover and refrigerate until well chilled.
6. For dressing: Whisk all ingredients in a medium bowl to blend. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
7. For salad:
a. Cook green beans in a large saucepan of boiling salted water until just tender. Drain.
b. Refresh under cold water. Drain well.
c. Pat dry.
d. Combine green beans and remaining ingredients in a large bowl.
e. Cut steaks diagonally into thin slices. Add to salad.
f. Add dressing and toss to coat; serve.
